Localization.Description: The privileges of a service account were escalated to the SYSTEM level using the S4UTomato utility

EventDescriptions.EventDescription: The privileges of service account {subject.account.name} were escalated to the SYSTEM level using the {reason} technique of the S4UTomato utility ({subject.process.name}), after which process {object.process.name} was started on host {event_src.host}
